title: Velcar Free Commerce Zone
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
{{Youmay|the Velcar Free Commerce Zone|the [[Velcar sector/Legends|Velcar sector]] or the [[Free Trade Zone/Legends|Free Trade Zone]]}}
The '''Velcar Free Commerce Zone''' ('''FCZ''') was a economic zone within the [[Velcar sector/Legends|Velcar sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] under the oversight by [[Commerce Master Commissioner]]s representing business interests. Many primitive [[Species/Legends|species]] inhabited the [[Planet/Legends|planets]], and were essentially [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] as indentured laborers. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was located in [[Oversector Outer]], and was under the influence of first [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], then his successor, [[Ardus Kaine]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Kaine held a series of [[Pentastar Talks|talks]] with the leaders of the Commerce Zone, along with neighboring political, military, and business leaders. At the end of the talks, a [[Pentastar Alignment Treaty|treaty]] was signed forming the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. The Velcar Free Commerce Zone was absorbed into the new government. The Alignment eventually collapsed and was annexed by the [[Imperial Remnant]].
